svg.title: CricIQ Full Stack Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing frontend, backend, ML, AI, database, and deployment layers of CricIQ

g.text: React + Tailwind CSS · Web Push notifications · Supabase Realtime
7 feature pages · PWA manifest · WebSocket client · Prediction game UI
REST APIs · WebSocket server · LangChain chains · SHAP explainer · CUSUM detector
Supabase Postgres + Realtime · ChromaDB (vector) · Cricsheet CSV (offline training)
CricAPI free tier OR Cricbuzz scraper · Polled every 30 s via FastAPI scheduler
